    Shakshuka: Eggs poached in spiced up tomato sauce

    Visit
    35 min
    ·
    Yield: 4 servings
    Shakshuka is a one pan dish that consists of eggs poached in a spiced up tomato sauce with ...

    Ingredients

    4 Eggs28 oz Canned whole or chopped tomatoes2 Medium onions2 Bell peppers1 Red chilli
